# Copilot Instructions — PikaCSS

This file is a thin compatibility forwarder for tools that only load workspace instructions from this fixed path.

Use [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) as the single source of truth for:

- repository rules
- routing and workflow boundaries
- validation policy
- file safety constraints

When instructions need to change, update [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) instead of duplicating content here.
